Hello world, this is a test.
PowerShell is a powerful scripting language.
Machine learning is fascinating and complex.
Artificial intelligence will change the world.
Neural networks can learn complex patterns.
Custom language models are interesting to build.
Programming requires logic and creativity.
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Natural language processing is a key AI technology.
Large language models have transformed AI research.
From scratch implementations teach fundamental concepts.
Transformer architectures revolutionized NLP.
Attention mechanisms allow models to focus on relevant information.
Self-attention computes relationships between all positions.
Multi-head attention captures different types of relationships.
Positional encoding provides sequence information.
Feed-forward networks process individual positions.
Layer normalization stabilizes training.
Dropout prevents overfitting.
Gradient clipping handles exploding gradients.
Adam optimizer adapts learning rates.
Cross-entropy loss measures classification error.
Perplexity evaluates language model quality.
BLEU score measures translation quality.
ROUGE score evaluates summarization.
F1 score balances precision and recall.
Accuracy measures correct predictions.
Precision measures true positives.
Recall measures found positives.
Specificity measures true negatives.
Negative predictive value measures true negatives.
Area under curve evaluates ranking.
Mean absolute error measures regression.
Root mean squared error penalizes large errors.
R-squared measures explained variance.
Silhouette score evaluates clustering.
Davies-Bouldin index measures cluster separation.
Calinski-Harabasz index measures cluster density.
